narratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन में मिलिट्री इक्वीपमेंट्स की खरीद-फरोख्त में बड़ी धांधली हुई है.
narratives.reasoning: The text directly accuses Ukraine of large-scale corruption in military equipment procurement, which undermines the legitimacy and effectiveness of its government and military efforts.

narratives.evidence_quote: पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ.
narratives.reasoning: This statement directly criticizes and diminishes the effectiveness of Western and European sanctions, portraying their diplomatic and economic pressure as a failure.

narratives.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narratives.evidence_quote: यूरोपीय देशों के रूसी एनर्जी पर निर्भरता ने यूरोपीय देशों को बड़ा झटका दिया.
narratives.reasoning: The text highlights a negative outcome (an energy crisis) for European countries as a direct consequence of their actions and dependencies related to the war, framing it as a significant blow.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian military
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेनी सेना के मैन पावर पांच लाख का है लेकिन इससे चार गुना बड़ी रूसी सेना के सामने वे दो साल से टिके हैं.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote frames the Ukrainian military's survival as a surprise against a vastly larger force, subtly undermining its inherent strength and suggesting it is only holding on due to the opponent's failure, not its own capability.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Ukraine is a puppet of the West
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन इस मामले में पूरी तरह से पश्चिमी देशों पर निर्भर है
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement directly claims Ukraine is completely dependent on Western countries for military equipment, supporting the subnarrative that Ukraine is not an independent actor but a client state of the West.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian government and officials and policies
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन में मिलिट्री इक्वीपमेंट्स की खरीद-फरोख्त में बड़ी धांधली हुई है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This is a direct allegation of large-scale corruption within Ukraine's military procurement system, aiming to delegitimize the government and its officials by portraying them as corrupt.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West is weak
subnarratives.evidence_quote: हालांकि, फिर भी वे व्लादिमीर पुतिन को रोक पाने में विफल रहे और आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly states that Western and European sanctions have failed to stop Putin and have had little effect on Russia, presenting the West's primary punitive tool as ineffective and thus portraying the West as weak and non-potent.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The EU is divided
subnarratives.evidence_quote: मसलन, शुरुआती दौर में देखा गया कि कई यूरोपीय देशों ने रूस पर दबाव बनाने के नजरिए से पश्चिमी खेमे में चले गए लेकिन तुरंत ही उन्हें ऊर्जा संकट ने घेर लिया।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote highlights that European countries initially joined the Western bloc to pressure Russia but were immediately hit by an energy crisis, implying their actions were not unified or sustainable due to differing vulnerabilities and interests, thus depicting the EU as a set of divided entities.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस ने जब यूक्रेन पर हमले किए, तो पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय देशों में एक आत्ममुग्धता का भाव था, जिससे वे यह समझकर चल रहे थे कि पूरी दुनिया पुतिन पर दबाव बनाने में पश्चिम का साथ देंगी, लेकिन ऐसा नहीं हुआ।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement actively promotes the idea that the West was arrogant and deluded in its belief of global support, which discredits Western diplomatic judgment and global influence. It supports the parent narrative of discrediting Western diplomacy but does not fit neatly into the more specific subnarrative definitions provided.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Sanctions imposed by Western countries will backfire
subnarratives.evidence_quote: हालांकि, फिर भी वे व्लादिमीर पुतिन को रोक पाने में विफल रहे और आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement directly claims that Western and European sanctions have failed to stop Putin and have had little effect on Russia, which is a clear promotion of the idea that sanctions have backfired or been ineffective.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस यूक्रेन युद्ध की वजह से 2022 में यूरोप में ऊर्जा संकट पैदा हुई... यूरोपीय देशों के रूसी एनर्जी पर निर्भरता ने यूरोपीय देशों को बड़ा झटका दिया।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote describes a specific negative consequence for Europe (an energy crisis and a 'big shock') caused by the war and Europe's dependence on Russian energy, which supports the parent narrative of negative consequences for the West but does not fit the 'sanctions backfire' or 'refugee flows' definitions.
